doc_title_en: Notice of Partial Correction to "Notice Regarding Decision on Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Cancellation of Treasury Stock"
doc_title_jp: （訂正）「自己株式取得に係る事項の決定及び自己株式の消却に関するお知らせ」の一部訂正について

key_facts.reason_jp: 発行済株式総数の記載誤り

summary_en: Correction to May 15, 2026 buyback disclosure. Issued shares outstanding (excl. treasury) adjusted from 715,428,374 to 715,828,374 shares. No change to buyback program terms or treasury stock holdings (1,506,899 shares).
summary_jp: 5月15日開示の訂正。発行済株式総数（自己株式除く）を715,428,374株から715,828,374株に訂正。自己株式数1,506,899株に変更なし。
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 - 開示訂正（2026年5月22日）

doc_title_en: Notice of Decision on Acquisition of Treasury Shares and Cancellation of Treasury Shares

key_facts.reason_jp: 株主還元方針に基づき

summary_en: 80M shares (11.2% of outstanding), ¥150.0B limit, open-market acquisition from May 18, 2026 to Mar 16, 2027. All acquired shares to be cancelled on Mar 23, 2027.
tag_en: Buyback - 80M shares (11.2% S/O) - ¥150.0B - Open market - May 2026–Mar 2027
